title: Lajpat Nagar Jewellery Heist
description: Three armed suspects raided a jewellery store in Lajpat Nagar market at 8:15 PM. One suspect disabled the CCTV DVR while two others looted display cases. Staff locked in back room. Suspects fled in an auto-rickshaw that was later found abandoned.
modus_operandi: Three-person team, one tech disabler, two looters. Pre-scouted location. Targeted weekend evening rush cover. Used disposable transport.

suspects.description: Male, 5'7", stocky, wore cap and surgical mask
Male, 5'11", tall slim build, gloves and full sleeve shirt

evidence.description: Exterior camera caught suspects arriving, faces partially obscured
Abandoned auto-rickshaw with partial prints on handlebar
Shop owner noted suspect 1 had a limp on left leg

blind_spots: Auto-rickshaw not traced for 3 days due to incomplete plate
DVR disabling method matched a 2019 case in Karol Bagh — not cross-referenced
Informant network in Lajpat Nagar not activated until day 7
resolution: Partial print on rickshaw handlebar matched known offender. Informant tip led to recovery location. All three arrested day 19.
